title: ABENA IHR Platform - Sample Medical Cases
description: Sample case scenarios for testing and reference

cases.title: Cardiovascular Risk with Sleep Apnea
medicalHistory: Obstructive sleep apnea with heavy snoring

socialHistory.occupation: Office job, sedentary (sits most of the day)
socialHistory.diet: Standard American diet - meat (chicken, beef), rice, potatoes, breads, desserts

reviewOfSystems.cardiovascular: No history of chest pain, occasional dyspnea on exertion

cases.title: Young Active Female with Low Back Pain
cases.chiefComplaint: Chronic low back pain with bilateral lower extremity radiculopathy, progressively worsening
medicalHistory: No history of back or leg injuries

socialHistory.exercise: Active lifestyle - regular walking, Pilates, and yoga
socialHistory.sleep: 5-6 hours per night, wakes at 6:00 AM

reviewOfSystems.musculoskeletal: Chronic low back pain with radiation down both legs, worsening over time
reviewOfSystems.neurological: Bilateral lower extremity symptoms consistent with possible radiculopathy

cases.title: Type 2 Diabetes with Complications
cases.chiefComplaint: Management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus with complications

socialHistory.alcohol: 1 glass of wine with dinner, 5 days per week
socialHistory.diet: Standard diet including fish, beef, chicken, salads, breads, sweets for dessert

reviewOfSystems.endocrine: Type 2 DM with suboptimal glucose control
reviewOfSystems.neurological: Bilateral lower extremity peripheral neuropathy affecting toes

cases.title: Elderly Patient with Congestive Heart Failure and Multiple Comorbidities
cases.chiefComplaint: Increasing fatigue and shortness of breath with minimal exertion, bilateral ankle swelling
medicalHistory: History of myocardial infarction (MI) 5 years ago
currentMedications: Lisinopril (ACE inhibitor for CHF and hypertension)
Acetaminophen as needed for arthritis pain

socialHistory.livingSituation: Lives with spouse, has adult children nearby
socialHistory.exercise: Limited due to fatigue, short walks around the house
socialHistory.tobacco: Former smoker, quit 10 years ago (40 pack-year history)
socialHistory.diet: Low sodium diet (2g/day), struggles with compliance

reviewOfSystems.cardiovascular: Dyspnea on exertion, orthopnea (sleeps on 3 pillows), bilateral lower extremity edema, irregular heartbeat
reviewOfSystems.musculoskeletal: Chronic knee and hip pain from osteoarthritis

cases.functionalStatus: Needs assistance with some activities of daily living (ADLs), uses cane for ambulation

cases.title: Young Adult with Anxiety and Metabolic Syndrome
cases.chiefComplaint: Persistent anxiety, difficulty sleeping, weight gain, and concerns about family history of diabetes
medicalHistory: Family history of Type 2 Diabetes (mother and grandmother)
Family history of cardiovascular disease (father had MI at age 52)
currentMedications: Oral contraceptive pills (for PCOS and cycle regulation)

socialHistory.exercise: Sedentary, sits 10+ hours per day, no regular exercise routine
socialHistory.sleep: Difficulty falling asleep, averages 5-6 hours per night, poor sleep quality
socialHistory.alcohol: 1-2 glasses of wine, 2-3 times per week
socialHistory.diet: Irregular eating schedule, frequent fast food and takeout, high carbohydrate intake, snacking while working
socialHistory.stress: High work stress, deadlines, poor work-life balance

reviewOfSystems.psychiatric: Generalized anxiety, worry, occasional panic attacks, good response to sertraline but still has breakthrough symptoms
reviewOfSystems.endocrine: Weight gain of 30 lbs over past 2 years, difficulty losing weight, irregular periods every 45-60 days

notes: These cases represent common primary care scenarios with varying complexity levels - cardiovascular risk management, acute musculoskeletal complaint in a healthy patient, chronic disease management with complications, elderly polypharmacy and heart failure management, and young adult mental health with metabolic concerns.
